spec.globalPrompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic full-body character portrait for a modern web novel. Preserve silhouette clarity, costume readability, realistic anatomy, realistic fabric texture, and a consistent live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, cropped head, doll-like face

characters.name: サトー
characters.prompt: Full-body portrait of Sato for the installment 'おっさんサトーの気ままな休日'. This must be a plain character portrait only, not a poster, not a title image, and not a book cover. Preserve the exact face, age, body impression, ponytail, mustache, and chin beard from the supplied canonical portrait. Show him in grounded spring Sunday Ameri-casual clothing suited for walking between a familiar bakery, an attached kissaten, old bookstores, a shopping street, and a neighborhood supermarket before relaxing with records at home: heather-gray henley T-shirt, faded blue chambray work shirt worn open, dark indigo denim, worn brown leather belt, practical suede work boots, canvas tote, understated wristwatch, calm and quietly satisfied expression. Use a simple realistic street or neutral exterior background with no readable shop signs and no decorative graphic elements. Keep him modest, believable, slightly rugged, and clearly not fast-fashion polished. Absolutely do not add any text, title lettering, Japanese characters, logos, cover design, or watermark anywhere in the frame.
characters.negativePrompt: young idol look, clean-shaven face, short hair, exaggerated bodybuilder muscles, fantasy armor, flashy race costume, office suit, luxury resort look, synthetic fast-fashion look, anime pretty-boy look, polished minimalist techwear, poster layout, book cover, title text, Japanese characters, English text, logo, watermark, readable sign, signage, cover typography
